calendar.matters:
Motion For Order Of Property Not A Dwelling Place For Judgment Debtor
Off Calendar Aug-19-2019 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion For Order For Sale Of Judgment Debtors Interest In Real Property (Not A Dwelling)
Off Calendar Aug-14-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Atty. Sydney E. Fairbairn,Tel. No. 1-415-883-2199 appearing for the
Plaintiff;
No other appearances on the matter.

RULING - PLAINTIFF EDWIN LEE's Motion For Order For Sale Of Judgment Debtors Interest In Real Property (Not A Dwelling) is Granted in the amount of $26,149.90 which is under the first abstract of judgment. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order and to comply with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR# 8600 =302/hk

Notice Of Motion For Order For Sale Of Judgment Debtors Interest In Real Property (Not A Dwelling)
Off Calendar Jun-21-2018 Continued To Aug-14-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Philip Kilduff, Esq. 415-673-0369 specially appearing for Plaintiff Edwin Lee.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Discussed. Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF EDWIN LEE'S Motion For Order For Sale Of Judgment Debtors Interest In Real Property (Not A Dwelling).

Continued to August 14, 2018 at 9:30 am for Plaintiff to provide answers to the Court's inquiry. 1) Can the order regarding sale of the property go forward with regard to the entirety of the amount owed or just the amount that's claimed through the first abstract of judgment and 2)Why other parties who claim an interest in the property have not been provided notice.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M.Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. =(302/HK)

Motion For Order Of Property Not A Dwelling Place For Judgment Debtor
Off Calendar Jul-24-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
William Abbott, Esq. (415-987-6051) for Plaintiff.
No other Appearance.

RULING - A R G U E D. Hearing is held. Plaintiff reports matter is unopposed. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF EDWIN LEE'S Motion For Order Of Property Not A Dwelling Place For Judgment Debtor
is Denied without Prejudice to being refiled for proper showing. Moving party to submit a proposed order in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. =(302/HK)

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
